continuity.source_thesis: Replace with the source idea that must stay true.
world_rules: Replace with a stable rule of how this world works.
Replace with what important machines, creatures, or systems can and cannot do.
map_anchors: Replace with stable places, routes, thresholds, or districts.
material_palette: Replace with recurring materials, colors, weather, light, and textures.

characters.name: Character Name
characters.visual_anchor: Stable silhouette, age/scale, colors, clothing/casing, distinctive marks, and recurring prop.
do_not_change: Replace with details that must not drift across images.
characters.prompt_snippet: Concise reusable prompt snippet for this character.

continuity.world_prompt_snippet: Concise reusable prompt snippet for the world.
continuity_risks: Replace with details likely to drift or be confused by image generation.

pages.heading: Meet The Cast
pages.text: Replace with short character descriptions and a locked label sheet.
pages.native_text_policy: Native image text is allowed for short integrated character names, badges, and one-line role notes after a label audit. Manually correct or regenerate any misspelled critical labels.

label_sheet.target: Replace with character or prop target.
label_sheet.reader_purpose: Explain who this character is, not only their name.
label_sheet.brief_explanation: Replace with a tiny role, want, job, or story function.
label_sheet.fallback: Overlay manually if native text is wrong.

pages.native_text_space: Use a clean world-native layout for portraits or avatars with calm areas for short names, labels, badges, and descriptions.

text_blocks.text: Replace with manual corrections or extra short labels only. Remove this block if all labels are accepted as native image text.

pages.heading: A Map Of The World
pages.text: Replace with a locked label sheet for map, object, machine, or concept labels.
pages.native_text_policy: Native image text is allowed for short integrated map marks, object labels, badges, arrows, route names, and tiny rules after a label audit. Manually correct or regenerate any misspelled critical labels.

label_sheet.target: Replace with map place, object, machine, or rule target.
label_sheet.reader_purpose: Explain what this fictional world element is when the name is not obvious.
label_sheet.brief_explanation: Replace with a tiny function, rule, or why-it-matters note.
label_sheet.max_length: 1 short label plus 1 brief function note
label_sheet.fallback: Overlay manually if native text is wrong.

pages.native_text_space: Use a map, cutaway, object atlas, route chart, machine diagram, or another world-native format with calm label areas.

text_blocks.text: Replace with manual corrections or extra short explanatory labels only. Remove this block if all labels are accepted as native image text.

pages.heading: Scene Heading
pages.text: Replace with final manuscript text for this spread.
pages.native_text_space: Illustration contains a calm blank or pale area sized for this text before image generation; do not render a generic panel or late white card over the art.

text_blocks.text: Replace with final manuscript text for this spread.

text_surface.description: Replace with the native quiet surface generated inside the art, such as pale sky, mist, wall, snow, water reflection, or a world-native object.
text_surface.edge_behavior: Replace with how the illustration naturally stops, dissolves, or gathers around this quiet surface without a hard panel edge.
text_surface.art_exclusion: Replace with what must stay out of the text area: faces, hands, ropes, labels, saturated color, high-detail texture, and focal action.

pages.native_text_space: Distinct portrait back-cover art leaves a calm native text area for a short blurb, source note, or production credit.

text_blocks.text: Replace with a short back-cover blurb, source note, or reader invitation.

text_surface.description: Replace with the native quiet surface generated inside the back-cover art.
text_surface.edge_behavior: Replace with how the back-cover illustration leaves this calm area.
text_surface.art_exclusion: Replace with what must stay out of the blurb area.
